implementation_level.claim_limit: The candidate COMSOL side port and passive connector participate in real field and particle solves. This does not modify the closed oaTOF Formal assets or establish independent SIMION/CAD connector parity.

nominal_registration.axis_mapping: RF +z -> oa +x; RF +x -> oa +y; RF +y -> oa +z
nominal_registration.derivation: Move the shared zero-gap RF source pose exactly 1.0 mm upstream along oa -x while retaining the right-handed rotation and oa target pose.

passive_connector_geometry.presence_rule: connector_gap_mm == 0 means direct mating with no separate connector domain; connector_gap_mm > 0 creates the finite grounded connector cavity

upstream_clear_aperture.derivation: Inherit the RF source-exit physical aperture; the connector may not add a smaller upstream stop.

downstream_entry_aperture.derivation: Inherit the shared physical-port width and coupled-longitudinal height; do not enlarge for S2.

field_ownership.policy: The 1 mm gap and both fringe-field regions belong to one joint model; no field stitching or coordinate teleportation is allowed.

no_pulse_field_candidate.purpose: Demonstrate one finite three-dimensional S2 joint-field solution on the frozen nominal geometry before any particle runtime.
no_pulse_field_candidate.rf_unit_voltage_derivation: Equal the absolute value of every entry in shared_physical_port_joint_geometry.field_basis.rf_unit.rod_differential_pattern_V.
no_pulse_field_candidate.rf_off_axis_probe_derivation: Use the RF rod-region axial midpoint and the configured local-x offset transformed by source_component_pose; the radius must remain inside resolved_design.geometry_mm.inscribed_radius_r0 and produce a nonzero RF-unit field.
no_pulse_field_candidate.boundary_probe_inset_derivation: Inherit shared_physical_port_joint_geometry.port_sweep.particle_release_offset_inside_outer_face_mm so nominal interface-plane probes are evaluated on the solved vacuum side.
no_pulse_field_candidate.acceptance: Both stationary bases solve, all required probe potentials and field components are finite, and the RF rod-region off-axis probe has nonzero RF-unit field magnitude.
no_pulse_field_candidate.claim_limit: Functional field-domain evidence only; no mesh convergence, leakage qualification, particle transmission, S2 PASS or Formal promotion.

functional_candidate.source_selection: Use the first-forward handoff events at RF local z=90.2 mm and transform them with nominal_registration.source_component_pose; do not project to the oa entry plane.
functional_candidate.detector_scope: Not included in the S2 passive-connector functional boundary; downstream oaTOF analysis remains a later stage.
functional_candidate.claim_limit: The N=100 run may demonstrate nominal RF-exit to oa-entry passive-connector function only; it cannot qualify downstream detector performance, pulse capture, tolerances, CAD or Formal assets.

geometry_build_evidence.claim_limit: Confirms the parameterized 1 mm nominal geometry builds and exposes nonempty connector and port vacuum selections only.

prior_attempts.reason: Connector end-face selection union used the wrong geometric entity level; COMSOL stopped before meshing or solving.
Both fields solved, but the text report serialized the per-element-type mesh count vector into scalar columns and lacked a nonzero off-axis RF diagnostic.

no_pulse_field_evidence.claim_limit: Demonstrates a finite nominal no-pulse S2 joint-field implementation only; no numerical convergence, leakage acceptance, particle transport, stage PASS or Formal claim.

nominal_particle_evidence.superseded_reason: The first event classifier treated all contacts with the oa entry plane as aperture crossings and therefore reported a false 100/100; the corrected AND rule requires plane contact and coordinates inside the 1.0 x 0.9 mm opening.
nominal_particle_evidence.claim_limit: Nominal RF-exit to oa-entry passive-connector function only; no minimum-transmission qualification, pulse, downstream analyzer, tolerance, convergence, S2 PASS or Formal claim.

current_cumulative_function_evidence.selection_policy: The two cases are functional topology evidence, not a controlled performance ranking or a qualified hardware selection.
